title: Hexcellent
description: Adding Additional Enchantments, the Mod modifies the magical experience 'lightly'
body:
Hexcellent currently adds 7 enchantments:
* Dash: While on the floor, it allows the play to utilize a keybind to gain a short burst of speed.
* Chuting: Upon the press of a keybind, your velocity is set all round to 0 except y momentum being set to a menial 0.2 , With some skill used to negate fall damage or knockback.
* Vaulting: While in the air and through the activation of a keybind, the player is launched in the direction they are looking in, though lightly.
* Buoyancy: When drowning your helmet will begin to pull you upward towards the surface of the waters... Hopefully,
* Continuity: merged with Chuting, the enchantment removes the negation of x and z vector velocity for the ability. Working as an inferior double jump with it.
* Dodging: passively each piece increases your chance to negate an attack received, playing a chime and leaving some ink behind upon activation.
* Stone Heart: Prevents death by initiating a buff which duration scales with the enchantment level. However it has a grand cooldown~

More enchantments will be added eventually. The upcoming updates focusing on potion effects and exp!
